member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Configuration.SimpleAuthServerConfiguration
member.summary: Top-level configuration object passed to AddSimpleAuth.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.SimpleAuthServerConfiguration.Issuer
member.summary: Issuer URL for tokens and discovery.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.SimpleAuthServerConfiguration.Store
member.summary: Store-related configuration.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.SimpleAuthServerConfiguration.Keys
member.summary: Signing-key configuration.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.SimpleAuthServerConfiguration.Discovery
member.summary: Discovery document configuration.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.SimpleAuthServerConfiguration.RateLimit
member.summary: Rate-limit configuration for the protocol endpoints.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.SimpleAuthServerConfiguration.Par
member.summary: Pushed Authorization Request (RFC 9126) configuration.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.SimpleAuthServerConfiguration.Interaction
member.summary: User interaction (login/consent) configuration.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Configuration.SimpleAuthServerConfiguration.Validate
member.summary: Validates the configuration before the server starts.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Configuration.StoreConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration for stores.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.StoreConfiguration.InMemory
member.summary: In-memory seed data used for development and tests.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Configuration.StoreConfiguration.UseInMemory(System.Action{SimpleAuth.Configuration.InMemoryStoreConfiguration})
member.summary: Configures the server to use in-memory stores.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Configuration.InMemoryStoreConfiguration
member.summary: Seed data for the in-memory store package.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.InMemoryStoreConfiguration.Clients
member.summary: Seed clients.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.InMemoryStoreConfiguration.Scopes
member.summary: Seed scopes.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.InMemoryStoreConfiguration.IdentityScopes
member.summary: Seed identity scopes.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.InMemoryStoreConfiguration.Resources
member.summary: Seed protected resources.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.InMemoryStoreConfiguration.AuthorizationCodes
member.summary: Seed authorization codes.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.InMemoryStoreConfiguration.RefreshTokens
member.summary: Seed refresh tokens.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.InMemoryStoreConfiguration.IssuedTokens
member.summary: Seed issued tokens.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.InMemoryStoreConfiguration.SigningKeys
member.summary: Seed signing keys.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.InMemoryStoreConfiguration.Consents
member.summary: Seed consents.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Configuration.KeyConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration for the signing key material.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.KeyConfiguration.EcKey
member.summary: Configured EC development key, if any.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.KeyConfiguration.RsaKey
member.summary: Configured RSA development key, if any.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.KeyConfiguration.KeyId
member.summary: Configured key identifier.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.KeyConfiguration.Algorithm
member.summary: Configured algorithm name.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Configuration.KeyConfiguration.UseDevelopmentKey
member.summary: Configures a throwaway EC P-256 development key.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Configuration.KeyConfiguration.UseDevelopmentRsaKey
member.summary: Configures a throwaway RSA-2048 development key.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Configuration.KeyConfiguration.BuildSigningKeyHolder
member.summary: Creates the active signing key holder.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Configuration.KeyConfiguration.EnsureConfigured
member.summary: Ensures some signing key has been configured.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Configuration.DiscoveryConfiguration
member.summary: Discovery-document behavior toggles.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.DiscoveryConfiguration.IncludeAuthorizationEndpoint
member.summary: Whether the authorize endpoint should be advertised.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.DiscoveryConfiguration.IncludeUserInfoEndpoint
member.summary: Whether to advertise the userinfo endpoint.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.DiscoveryConfiguration.IncludeIntrospectionEndpoint
member.summary: Whether to advertise the introspection endpoint.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.DiscoveryConfiguration.IncludeRevocationEndpoint
member.summary: Whether to advertise the revocation endpoint.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Configuration.RateLimitConfiguration
member.summary: Rate-limit settings for the protocol endpoints.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.RateLimitConfiguration.Enabled
member.summary: Whether rate limiting is enabled. Defaults to . Set to to disable entirely (e.g., in tests).

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.RateLimitConfiguration.TokenPermitLimit
member.summary: Maximum token-endpoint requests allowed per per IP address. Defaults to 20.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.RateLimitConfiguration.TokenWindow
member.summary: Sliding window for the token-endpoint rate limit. Defaults to 1 minute.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.RateLimitConfiguration.AuthorizePermitLimit
member.summary: Maximum authorize-endpoint requests allowed per per IP address. Defaults to 30.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.RateLimitConfiguration.AuthorizeWindow
member.summary: Sliding window for the authorize-endpoint rate limit. Defaults to 1 minute.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.RateLimitConfiguration.RejectionStatusCode
member.summary: HTTP status code returned when the limit is exceeded. Defaults to 429.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Configuration.PushedAuthorizationConfiguration
member.summary: Pushed Authorization Request (RFC 9126) settings.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.PushedAuthorizationConfiguration.Enabled
member.summary: Whether the PAR endpoint (POST /connect/par) is enabled. Defaults to .

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.PushedAuthorizationConfiguration.Required
member.summary: When , all authorize requests MUST use PAR. Direct calls to /connect/authorize without a request_uri are rejected. Defaults to .

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.PushedAuthorizationConfiguration.RequestLifetime
member.summary: How long a PAR entry lives before the authorize endpoint must consume it. RFC 9126 §2.2 recommends between 5 s and 600 s. Defaults to 90 seconds.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Configuration.InteractionConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration for user interaction pages (login, consent, error).

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.InteractionConfiguration.LoginPath
member.summary: Path to the login page. Default: "/account/login".

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.InteractionConfiguration.ConsentPath
member.summary: Path to the consent page. Default: "/account/consent".

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.InteractionConfiguration.ErrorPath
member.summary: Path to the error page. Default: "/account/error".

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.InteractionConfiguration.ReturnUrlParameter
member.summary: Name of the query parameter used to pass the return URL. Default: "returnUrl".

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.InteractionConfiguration.EnableBuiltInPages
member.summary: Whether to enable the built-in minimal login/consent UI pages. Set to false if you provide your own pages. Default: true.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Configuration.InteractionConfiguration.CookieScheme
member.summary: Cookie authentication scheme name used by SimpleAuth. Default: "SimpleAuth.Cookie".

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Crypto.DPopValidationResult
member.summary: The outcome of a DPoP proof validation attempt.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Crypto.DPopValidationResult.JktThumbprint
member.summary: JWK thumbprint of the DPoP public key. Non-null when is true.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Crypto.DPopValidationResult.Error
member.summary: Human-readable failure reason. Non-null when is false.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Crypto.DPopProofValidator
member.summary: Validates DPoP proof JWTs per RFC 9449 §4.3. Validates signature, header, payload claims, and replay protection via .

member.name: F:SimpleAuth.Crypto.DPopProofValidator.MaxIatSkewSeconds
member.summary: Maximum age of a DPoP proof's iat claim (seconds).

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.DPopProofValidator.ValidateAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,SimpleAuth.IJtiStore,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates a DPoP proof JWT presented at the token endpoint or a resource endpoint.
member.param: Raw DPoP JWT string from the DPoP header.
Expected HTTP URI (scheme + authority + path, no query).
Store used to detect and prevent proof replay.
If non-null, the validator also verifies the ath claim equals base64url(SHA-256()). Required for DPoP-bound resource access (RFC 9449 §7.1).

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.DPopProofValidator.ComputeThumbprint(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Computes the JWK thumbprint (RFC 7638) for a public key JSON element.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.DPopProofValidator.ContainsPrivateKeyMaterial(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Checks if a JWK JSON element contains private key parameters (d, p, q, dp, dq, qi).

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.DPopProofValidator.BuildSecurityKeyAndThumbprint(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Builds a and JWK thumbprint from a jwk JSON element.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.DPopProofValidator.ComputeEcThumbprint(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Computes RFC 7638 JWK thumbprint for an EC key. Canonical form: {"crv":"P-256","kty":"EC","x":"...","y":"..."} (alphabetical key order).

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.DPopProofValidator.ComputeRsaThumbprint(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Computes RFC 7638 JWK thumbprint for an RSA key. Canonical form: {"e":"...","kty":"RSA","n":"..."} (alphabetical key order).

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.DPopProofValidator.ComputeAth(System.String)
member.summary: Computes ath claim value: base64url(SHA-256(ascii(access_token))). RFC 9449 §4.2.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.DPopProofValidator.NormalizeUri(System.String)
member.summary: Strips query string and fragment from a URI for htu comparison.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Crypto.JwkSerializer
member.summary: Converts signing keys to JWK (JSON Web Key) format per RFC 7517. Only public material is exported — private keys never leave this layer.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.JwkSerializer.FromEcKey(System.Security.Cryptography.ECDsa,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Exports an EC public key as a JWK object.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.JwkSerializer.FromRsaKey(System.Security.Cryptography.RSA,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Exports an RSA public key as a JWK object.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.JwkSerializer.BuildJwks(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{SimpleAuth.Crypto.Jwk})
member.summary: Serializes a JWKS document (array of JWKs) to a UTF-8 JSON byte array for caching and direct HTTP response writing.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Crypto.Jwk
member.summary: A JSON Web Key (public material only).
member.param: EC public key X coordinate (EC keys only).
EC public key Y coordinate (EC keys only).

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.Jwk.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: A JSON Web Key (public material only).
member.param: EC public key X coordinate (EC keys only).
EC public key Y coordinate (EC keys only).

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Crypto.Jwk.Kty
member.summary: Key type: EC or RSA.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Crypto.Jwk.Use
member.summary: Key use: sig.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Crypto.Jwk.Kid
member.summary: Key ID.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Crypto.Jwk.Alg
member.summary: Algorithm: ES256, RS256, etc.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Crypto.Jwk.Crv
member.summary: EC curve (EC keys only): P-256.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Crypto.Jwk.X
member.summary: EC public key X coordinate (EC keys only).

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Crypto.Jwk.Y
member.summary: EC public key Y coordinate (EC keys only).

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Crypto.Jwk.N
member.summary: RSA modulus (RSA keys only).

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Crypto.Jwk.E
member.summary: RSA public exponent (RSA keys only).

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Crypto.JwksDocument
member.summary: The jwks.json document: { "keys": [ ... ] }.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.JwksDocument.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{SimpleAuth.Crypto.Jwk})
member.summary: The jwks.json document: { "keys": [ ... ] }.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Crypto.JwksDocument.Keys
member.summary: The collection of public JWKs.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Crypto.JwtService
member.summary: Issues signed JWTs (access tokens and ID tokens) using from Microsoft.IdentityModel.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.JwtService.RotateKey(SimpleAuth.Crypto.SigningKeyHolder)
member.summary: Replaces the active signing key (key rotation).

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.JwtService.IssueAccessToken(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.TimeSpan,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Security.Claims.Claim},System.String)
member.summary: Issues an access token with typ: at+jwt per RFC 9068.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.JwtService.IssueIdToken(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.TimeSpan,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Security.Claims.Claim})
member.summary: Issues an OIDC ID token per OpenID Connect Core 1.0 §2.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.JwtService.ComputeAtHash(System.String)
member.summary: Computes at_hash claim: left-most half of SHA-256 of the access token, Base64Url-encoded per OIDC Core §3.3.2.11.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SigningKeyHolder
member.summary: Wraps a signing key with its for use by .

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SigningKeyHolder.Key
member.summary: Underlying key material.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SigningKeyHolder.SecurityKey
member.summary: Security key used for JWT validation.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SigningKeyHolder.KeyId
member.summary: Key ID matching the JWK in the JWKS document.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SigningKeyHolder.Algorithm
member.summary: Algorithm: ES256, RS256, etc.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SigningKeyHolder.Credentials
member.summary: Ready-to-use signing credentials for .

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SigningKeyHolder.FromEcKey(System.Security.Cryptography.ECDsa,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a holder from an EC key.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SigningKeyHolder.FromRsaKey(System.Security.Cryptography.RSA,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a holder from an RSA key.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Crypto.PkceValidator
member.summary: PKCE code verifier and challenge validator per RFC 7636. Only S256 is accepted — plain is permanently rejected.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.PkceValidator.Validate(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates a PKCE code verifier against the stored challenge. Returns only when the verifier is structurally valid and its S256 challenge matches.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.PkceValidator.IsMethodAllowed(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that a code_challenge_method value is accepted. plain is always rejected per OAuth 2.1 §7.6.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SecretHasher
member.summary: Hashes and verifies client and resource secrets using PBKDF2-SHA256. Secrets are NEVER stored in plaintext — only the hash is persisted.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SecretHasher.Hash(System.String)
member.summary: Hashes a plaintext secret and returns a storable string. Format: v1:{base64(salt)}:{base64(hash)}.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SecretHasher.Verify(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies a plaintext secret against a previously hashed value. Returns for any invalid or malformed stored hash.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SigningKeyGenerator
member.summary: Generates signing keys for OAuth token issuance. Supports EC P-256 (preferred) and RSA-2048.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SigningKeyGenerator.CreateEcKey
member.summary: Creates a new EC P-256 signing key with a deterministic key ID.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SigningKeyGenerator.CreateRsaKey
member.summary: Creates a new RSA-2048 signing key with a deterministic key ID.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SigningKeyGenerator.ExportEcPrivateKeyPem(System.Security.Cryptography.ECDsa)
member.summary: Exports an EC private key to PEM format.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SigningKeyGenerator.ExportRsaPrivateKeyPem(System.Security.Cryptography.RSA)
member.summary: Exports an RSA private key to PEM format (PKCS#8).

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SigningKeyGenerator.ImportEcPrivateKeyPem(System.String)
member.summary: Imports an EC private key from PEM.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SigningKeyGenerator.ImportRsaPrivateKeyPem(System.String)
member.summary: Imports an RSA private key from PEM.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Crypto.SigningKeyGenerator.BuildKeyId(System.String)
member.summary: Builds a deterministic key ID: {alg}-{yyyyMMddHHmmss}-{4hex}. Example: ec-20260120-143022-a3f2.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.DiscoveryEndpoint
member.summary: Serves the cached discovery document.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.DiscoveryEndpoint.HandleAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Writes the discovery JSON document (state resolved from DI).

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.DiscoveryEndpoint.HandleAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,SimpleAuth.SimpleAuthServerState)
member.summary: Writes the discovery JSON document.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.JwksEndpoint
member.summary: Serves the cached JWKS document.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.JwksEndpoint.HandleAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Writes the JWKS JSON document (state resolved from DI).

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.JwksEndpoint.HandleAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,SimpleAuth.SimpleAuthServerState)
member.summary: Writes the JWKS JSON document.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.AuthorizationEndpoint
member.summary: Issues authorization codes for the authorization code flow.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.AuthorizationEndpoint.HandleAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Handles browser-based authorization requests.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.AuthorizationEndpoint.ParseRequestedUserInfoClaims(System.String)
member.summary: Parses the OIDC §5.5 claims JSON parameter and returns the userinfo claim names requested. Returns an empty list if the parameter is absent, malformed, or has no userinfo entries.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.InteractionEndpoints
member.summary: Built-in minimal login and consent UI pages for SimpleAuth.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.InteractionEndpoints.HandleLoginAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Renders the login form (GET) or processes login (POST).

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.InteractionEndpoints.HandleConsentAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Renders the consent form (GET) or processes consent (POST).

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.InteractionEndpoints.HandleLogoutAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Handles logout.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.JsonResponseWriter
member.summary: Writes JSON responses using source-generated metadata.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.JsonResponseWriter.WriteAsync``1(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,``0,System.Text.Json.Serialization.Metadata.JsonTypeInfo{``0})
member.summary: Serializes a value and writes it to the response body.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.ProtocolTokenSupport
member.summary: Shared protocol helpers for bearer token endpoints.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.ProtocolTokenSupport.ResolveAccessTokenAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Attempts to resolve an active access token from the request bearer header.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.ProtocolTokenSupport.ResolveAccessTokenAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to resolve an active access token by its raw token value.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.ProtocolTokenSupport.WriteErrorAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Writes a standard OAuth error response.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.ProtocolTokenSupport.ResolveCallerClientAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Authenticates the caller client for management-style endpoints.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.AccessTokenDetails
member.summary: Resolved access token metadata.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.AccessTokenDetails.IsReference
member.summary: Gets whether the token was reference-based.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.AccessTokenDetails.RawToken
member.summary: Gets the raw token or handle used on the request.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.AccessTokenDetails.ClientId
member.summary: Gets the token client identifier, if known.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.AccessTokenDetails.SubjectId
member.summary: Gets the subject identifier, if present.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.AccessTokenDetails.Scopes
member.summary: Gets the granted scopes.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.AccessTokenDetails.ExpiresAt
member.summary: Gets the expiration time if available.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.AccessTokenDetails.Jti
member.summary: Gets the token identifier if available.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.AccessTokenDetails.Claims
member.summary: Gets the underlying claims.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.AccessTokenDetails.JktThumbprint
member.summary: JWK thumbprint from the cnf.jkt claim (RFC 9449). Non-null when the token is DPoP-bound; null for standard Bearer tokens.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.AccessTokenDetails.RequestedUserInfoClaims
member.summary: Claim names explicitly requested via the OIDC claims parameter (§5.5) for userinfo. Populated only for reference tokens where the claim is stored on the .

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.AccessTokenDetails.FromClaimsIdentity(System.Security.Claims.ClaimsIdentity,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a detail object from a validated JWT.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.AccessTokenDetails.FromIssuedToken(SimpleAuth.IssuedToken,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a detail object from a reference token record.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.AccessTokenDetails.ExtractJktFromCnfClaim(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Security.Claims.Claim})
member.summary: Extracts the DPoP JWK thumbprint from the cnf claim. Microsoft.IdentityModel flattens nested JSON as a string claim with value = serialized JSON.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.UserInfoEndpoint
member.summary: Returns the current user's claims.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.UserInfoEndpoint.HandleAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Returns user claims based on the bearer token.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.UserInfoEndpoint.GetPresentedToken(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,System.String@)
member.summary: Reads the raw access token string from the request, accepting both Bearer and DPoP schemes. Also accepts access_token in POST body per RFC 6750 §2.2 (optional form parameter method). Outputs the scheme used so callers can enforce DPoP scheme requirement (RFC 9449 §7.1).

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.IntrospectionEndpoint
member.summary: Returns token metadata for RFC 7662 introspection.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.IntrospectionEndpoint.HandleAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Returns whether the supplied token is active.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.RevocationEndpoint
member.summary: Revokes access or refresh tokens.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.RevocationEndpoint.HandleAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Revokes a token handle and always returns 200.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.EndSessionEndpoint
member.summary: OIDC RP-Initiated Logout per OpenID Connect RP-Initiated Logout 1.0. Revokes all tokens for the subject identified by id_token_hint and redirects to post_logout_redirect_uri if provided.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.EndSessionEndpoint.HandleAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Processes the end-session request.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.PushedAuthorizationEndpoint
member.summary: Handles the Pushed Authorization Request endpoint (RFC 9126). POST /connect/par — accepts the same parameters as the authorize endpoint, authenticates the client, and returns a short-lived request_uri handle.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.PushedAuthorizationEndpoint.HandleAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Handles a PAR request.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.SimpleAuthEndpointMiddlewareExtensions
member.summary: Routing helpers that map the built-in SimpleAuth endpoints.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.SimpleAuthEndpointMiddlewareExtensions.MapSimpleAuthWellKnown(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication)
member.summary: Adds the discovery endpoints to the pipeline.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.SimpleAuthEndpointMiddlewareExtensions.MapSimpleAuthConnect(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication)
member.summary: Adds the protocol endpoints to the pipeline.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.TokenEndpoint
member.summary: Handles the token endpoint.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.TokenEndpoint.HandleAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Processes client_credentials and authorization_code token requests.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Endpoints.TokenEndpoint.BuildHtu(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Builds the HTTP target URI (htu) for DPoP proof validation from the current request. Strips the query string per RFC 9449 §4.2.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.TokenResponse
member.summary: Successful token endpoint response per RFC 6749 §5.1 / OAuth 2.1.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.TokenResponse.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Successful token endpoint response per RFC 6749 §5.1 / OAuth 2.1.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.TokenResponse.RefreshToken
member.summary: Refresh token (present only when offline_access was granted).

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.TokenResponse.Scope
member.summary: Granted scope when it differs from the requested scope.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.TokenResponse.IdToken
member.summary: ID token (present only for OIDC requests).

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.ErrorResponse
member.summary: OAuth 2.x error response per RFC 6749 §5.2.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.ErrorResponse.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: OAuth 2.x error response per RFC 6749 §5.2.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument
member.summary: OIDC discovery document per OpenID Connect Discovery 1.0 §3.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.Issuer
member.summary: Issuer identifier URL.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.AuthorizationEndpoint
member.summary: Authorization endpoint URL.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.TokenEndpoint
member.summary: Token endpoint URL.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.UserInfoEndpoint
member.summary: UserInfo endpoint URL.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.JwksUri
member.summary: JWKS endpoint URL.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.EndSessionEndpoint
member.summary: End session endpoint URL.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.IntrospectionEndpoint
member.summary: Introspection endpoint URL.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.RevocationEndpoint
member.summary: Revocation endpoint URL.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.ResponseTypesSupported
member.summary: Supported response types.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.ResponseModesSupported
member.summary: Supported response modes.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.GrantTypesSupported
member.summary: Supported grant types.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.SubjectTypesSupported
member.summary: Supported subject types.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.IdTokenSigningAlgValuesSupported
member.summary: Supported ID token signing algorithms.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.ScopesSupported
member.summary: Supported scopes.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.TokenEndpointAuthMethodsSupported
member.summary: Supported token endpoint auth methods.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.ClaimsSupported
member.summary: Supported claims.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.CodeChallengeMethodsSupported
member.summary: Whether PKCE S256 is required.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.RequestObjectSigningAlgValuesSupported
member.summary: Supported request object signing algorithms (for PAR).

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.PushedAuthorizationRequestEndpoint
member.summary: PAR endpoint (RFC 9126).

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.RequirePushedAuthorizationRequests
member.summary: Whether PAR is required for all clients.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.DPopSigningAlgValuesSupported
member.summary: DPoP signing algorithms supported (RFC 9449).

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.RequestParameterSupported
member.summary: Whether JAR request parameter is supported (RFC 9101).

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.DiscoveryDocument.RequestUriParameterSupported
member.summary: Whether JAR request_uri by-reference is supported (RFC 9101).

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.UserInfoResponse
member.summary: UserInfo endpoint response per OIDC Core §5.3.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.UserInfoResponse.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes an empty UserInfo response.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.IntrospectionResponse
member.summary: Token introspection response per RFC 7662 §2.2.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.IntrospectionResponse.Active
member.summary: Whether the token is currently active.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.IntrospectionResponse.Scope
member.summary: Space-separated list of scopes.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.IntrospectionResponse.ClientId
member.summary: Client ID the token was issued to.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.IntrospectionResponse.Sub
member.summary: Subject (end-user) identifier.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.IntrospectionResponse.Exp
member.summary: Token expiration (Unix timestamp).

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.IntrospectionResponse.Iat
member.summary: Token issued-at (Unix timestamp).

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.IntrospectionResponse.Nbf
member.summary: Token not-before (Unix timestamp).

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.IntrospectionResponse.Jti
member.summary: JWT ID (token unique identifier).

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.IntrospectionResponse.Iss
member.summary: Issuer.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.IntrospectionResponse.Aud
member.summary: Audience.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.IntrospectionResponse.TokenType
member.summary: Token type hint.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.ParResponse
member.summary: Pushed Authorization Request response per RFC 9126 §2.2.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.ParResponse.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushed Authorization Request response per RFC 9126 §2.2.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Serialization.AuthJsonContext
member.summary: Source-generated JSON context for all SimpleAuth HTTP response types. Native AOT-safe — no reflection used at runtime.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Serialization.AuthJsonContext.Boolean
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Serialization.AuthJsonContext.NullableBoolean
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Serialization.AuthJsonContext.Jwk
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Serialization.AuthJsonContext.Default
member.summary: The default associated with a default instance.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.Serialization.AuthJsonContext.GeneratedSerializerOptions
member.summary: The source-generated options associated with this context.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.SimpleAuthExtensions
member.summary: Entry-point extensions for wiring SimpleAuth into ASP.NET Core.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.SimpleAuthExtensions.AddSimpleAuth(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{SimpleAuth.Configuration.SimpleAuthServerConfiguration})
member.summary: Registers SimpleAuth services using the provided configuration lambda.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.SimpleAuthExtensions.MapSimpleAuth(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication)
member.summary: Maps the SimpleAuth HTTP endpoints into the app pipeline.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.SimpleAuthServerState
member.summary: Internal singleton state for cached discovery and JWKS documents.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.SimpleAuthServerState.#ctor(System.String,System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte})
member.summary: Creates the server state.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.SimpleAuthServerState.Issuer
member.summary: Issuer URL.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.SimpleAuthServerState.DiscoveryJson
member.summary: Cached discovery JSON bytes.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.SimpleAuthServerState.JwksJson
member.summary: Cached JWKS JSON bytes.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.RateLimitPolicyNames
member.summary: Named rate-limiter policies used by SimpleAuth endpoints.
